chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI S.C.R.A. No. 424 and 425 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For order on office objection No.01 2. For order on CMA No.2110 /2024 (exemption) 3. For hearing of Main Case 4. For order on CMA No.2111/2024 (stay) 29.01.2026 Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, advocate for applicant Admittedly, these reference applications are time barred and no application seeking delay to be condoned has been filed. In view thereof, these reference applications are dismissed being timed barred. Office to place a copy of this order in the connected matter. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of the Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Ashraf
